title: Grid
description:
Grid: An individual Grid 'line' - can be curved or free-form as well as simple linear line segments. 
Useful for coordination and setting out of spatial objects for transdisciplinary workflows.

Name.description: The Grid Reference, ID or text based identifier.

Curve.description: The centreline defining the Grid's path. Can be curved or linear. ICurve: The interface for all one-dimensional geometrical objects.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
